mechanics.excerpt: If you choose t0 end the Life Path here and play your character as young adult; proceed to Assigning Attributes Traits and Skills (p. 54). Characters can also return t0 this stage after following one more Real Lite paths_ subject to any listed Next Path restrictions_ Clan Characters: Civilian characters ad failed warriors proceed to Stage for final training in their caste.
